reverse-engineer.description: Reverse engineers the live Shopify site (www.homeu.ph) and generates complete migration data for Payload CMS

shopify-reverse-engineer.description: Reverse engineer Shopify site, extract all data (products, collections, pages, SEO, theme), and generate Payload CMS migration artifacts

reverse-engineer.description: Run the Shopify reverse engineering and migration pipeline
reverse-engineer.prompt: Load the shopify-reverse-engineer skill and follow all phases to reverse engineer www.homeu.ph and prepare Payload CMS migration data.
